_about: SOURCE OF TRUTH for the fak BENCHMARK BREADTH card (visuals/55-hero-statcard.svg), rendered by tools/hero_statcard_gen.py. A capabilities sweep across fak's three pillars (serving efficiency / correctness / security kernel) + an honest single-stream fence — NOT a single hero number. Every metric traces to fak/BENCHMARK-AUTHORITY.md by commit. Each row carries a `class` that sets its honesty chip + colour: a SOTA baseline, a NAIVE strawman, and an absolute measurement are coloured differently so the biggest number (139.3x vs naive) can never read as a SOTA win. Design = a judge-panel synthesis (Anthropic model-card / NVIDIA MLPerf / DeepMind matrix / system-card references). Edit this file, then run `python tools/hero_statcard_gen.py`.

meta.title: fak — the agent kernel, by the benchmarks
meta.machine: Apple M3 Pro 6P+6E 36 GB · app_version 0.30.0 · llama.cpp b9707, same box

masthead.title: fak owns the whole agent-infrastructure boundary
masthead.subtitle: Breadth across three pillars — it does the SOTA serving stack's reuse, AND owns the safety/correctness boundary they don't, proven exact, at syscall speed.

rail.thesis: fak is the kernel under the agent stack — it does SOTA reuse, proves that reuse is exact, and makes the permission gate a syscall.
rail.impact: Serving engines accelerate one stream. fak eliminates redundant work across a fleet AND adjudicates every tool call in-process — one address space, no boundary tax.

pillars.subhead: vs the best already-shipped serving stack

rows.label: 50-turn × 5-agent fleet serving
rows.baseline: vs tuned warm per-agent KV — the SGLang/vLLM discipline on fak's own kernel

rows.label: Long-context session value-add (T=512)
rows.baseline: vs a naive stateless re-prefill loop

pillars.name: CORRECTNESS
pillars.subhead: exact — what no serving engine proves

rows.baseline: exact accounting — reuse, not a shortcut

rows.label: Nested prompt-injection containment

fence.name: SINGLE STREAM — WHERE fak DOES NOT LEAD
fence.tag: shown, not hidden — fak explicitly does not target raw throughput

footer.line1: fak is the kernel under the agent stack — it does SOTA reuse AND owns the safety boundary, proven exact, at syscall speed.
footer.line2: one chat → llama.cpp; an agent fleet → fak.
